description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU CI that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. The workflow has three jobs: build_and_test_amd, test_amd_gpu, and build_and_test_cpu. The build_and_test_amd job runs on a container with ubuntu:20.04, sets up the environment, checks out the repository, and performs various build and test steps for AMD GPUs with ROCm 5.3 and Python 3.10. The build_and_test_cpu job runs on ubuntu-20.04 or ubuntu-latest, sets up the environment, checks out the repository, and performs various build and test steps for CPU with PyTorch and Python 3.8, 3.9, or 3.10.
